title: An Afternoon in the Library
prose: The library is enormous and mostly silent, Madam Pince patrolling the stacks like she's daring someone to so much as breathe on a book cover wrong. The Restricted Section looms behind its rope at the back — off-limits without a signed note from a professor, which only makes it more interesting.

You're technically here for a Herbology essay, but it's easy to lose an hour just following one footnote to the next shelf, then the next, in a building that seems to have a book on absolutely everything.

choices.label: Actually finish the essay you came for.
Get pleasantly distracted by something unrelated.
